testcase.name: register_usernameExists()

failure.message: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: expected: <Username already exists> but was: <Username is already taken>

testcase.failure: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: expected: <Username already exists> but was: <Username is already taken> at app//org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionFailureBuilder.build(AssertionFailureBuilder.java:151) at app//org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionFailureBuilder.buildAndThrow(AssertionFailureBuilder.java:132) at app//org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertEquals.failNotEqual(AssertEquals.java:197) at app//org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertEquals.assertEquals(AssertEquals.java:182) at app//org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertEquals.assertEquals(AssertEquals.java:177) at app//org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.assertEquals(Assertions.java:1145) at app//com.badminton.service.AuthServiceTest.register_usernameExists(AuthServiceTest.java:97) at java.base@17.0.12/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:568) at java.base@17.0.12/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) at java.base@17.0.12/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511)

testcase.name: refresh_tokenBlacklisted()

failure.message: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: expected: <403 FORBIDDEN> but was: <401 UNAUTHORIZED>

testcase.failure: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: expected: <403 FORBIDDEN> but was: <401 UNAUTHORIZED> at app//org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionFailureBuilder.build(AssertionFailureBuilder.java:151) at app//org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionFailureBuilder.buildAndThrow(AssertionFailureBuilder.java:132) at app//org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertEquals.failNotEqual(AssertEquals.java:197) at app//org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertEquals.assertEquals(AssertEquals.java:182) at app//org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertEquals.assertEquals(AssertEquals.java:177) at app//org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.assertEquals(Assertions.java:1145) at app//com.badminton.service.AuthServiceTest.refresh_tokenBlacklisted(AuthServiceTest.java:150) at java.base@17.0.12/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:568) at java.base@17.0.12/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) at java.base@17.0.12/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511)

testcase.name: register_emailExists()

failure.message: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: expected: <Email already exists> but was: <Email is already registered>

testcase.failure: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: expected: <Email already exists> but was: <Email is already registered> at app//org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionFailureBuilder.build(AssertionFailureBuilder.java:151) at app//org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionFailureBuilder.buildAndThrow(AssertionFailureBuilder.java:132) at app//org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertEquals.failNotEqual(AssertEquals.java:197) at app//org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertEquals.assertEquals(AssertEquals.java:182) at app//org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertEquals.assertEquals(AssertEquals.java:177) at app//org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.assertEquals(Assertions.java:1145) at app//com.badminton.service.AuthServiceTest.register_emailExists(AuthServiceTest.java:86) at java.base@17.0.12/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:568) at java.base@17.0.12/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) at java.base@17.0.12/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511)

testcase.name: changePassword_wrongOldPassword()

failure.message: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: expected: <Old password is incorrect> but was: <Incorrect old password>
